title: Wyper Pushes the War Forward
description: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Wyper, Narrator, Shandia warrior. Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: There won't be another chance like this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: We shall not let this chance escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you ready to leave behind...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your.... your fallen comrades in Battle?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Only then should you come with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I'm going to cut off enel's head.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: including the 3 priests and their trials...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Yahahahaha!! The more the merrier, isn't it...?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: The real power of Sky combats!!!

summary: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
